title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Jinbe, Shanks, Luffy, Robin as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the name of justice, they beat up those powerless researchers with violence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just because they had an

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "Unreasonable opinion"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will make an army that can fight it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You? Who despises violence?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just see it, vegapunk! I will change the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I won't let..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Clover's death and the will of Ohara go in vain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That year, Dragon along with

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Emporic IvanKov

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: And Barth- Olomew Kuma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They established the "revolution army" that shocked the world!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffy's Father is very passionate!

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: They went to Elbaf?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dragon was professor Clover's acquaintance? I never knew they knew each other!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: I'm shocked! Why did Kuma save us?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, why did you remodel him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that bastard "IVA" is one of revolutionary army's founders...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The Books of Ohara...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: didn't fall into the government's hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because I was very interested in them, I secretly went to Elbaf.....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They let me read all of the documents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in other words... I read all about ohara and the secrets of the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Inside of my head for progressing my research!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The name of that giant's captain is Saul, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These photos

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Right now he is hiding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No one will disclose his whereabouts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please email

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Thank you, Dr. vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE DON'T LET CHARA'S BATTLE GO IN VAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm an ally for every scholar.

dialogue.speaker: Pythagoras
dialogue.text: That is my nature as a researcher.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uwah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The shoes are moving by themselves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I still can't release you.... Follow me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is something that I want to show you.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
